title: Abhishek Singhvi helps out TVK with legal woes, again
description: On Sunday, when senior Congress leader Rahul Gandhi shared the stage with Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) president C Jopesh Vijay as the latter took oath as the chief minister of Tamil Nadu, another Congress leader— Abhishek Singhvi— appeared in Madras high court in a case that can damage the ruling coalition’s wafer-thin majority.
